description: Lock Art Conservation Workshops to source-backed painting/material conservation practice rather than publication-law lineage.

checks.reason: The corrected node uses a fifteenth-century anchor for painting-restoration practice and technical-material documentation, with explicit date uncertainty.
Oil painting is a major class of objects and material techniques treated by the scoped conservation workshop practice.
Pigment and binder preparation knowledge is part of the source-backed material basis for examining, repairing, and repainting painted surfaces.
Printing-privilege law is outside the corrected object-treatment and material-conservation scope.
